_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Each manufacturer or other entity within the meaning of Article 13b(1) shall appoint a contact point for the purpose of reporting data.
prior.source_span: 2. Each manufacturer or other entity within the meaning of paragraph 1 shall appoint a contact point for the purpose of reporting data in accordance with this Regulation.
